sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 마이크론이 2025 회계연도 4분기 실적 가이던스를 매출 112억 달러 및 EPS 2.85달러로 상향 조정했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 마이크론은 2025 회계연도 4분기 매출 가이던스를 기존 107억 달러에서 112억 달러로 상향 조정했습니다.
비일반회계기준(non-GAAP) 기준 EPS 가이던스를 기존 2.50달러에서 2.85달러로 상향하며 수익성 개선을 예고했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 강력한 실행력과 메모리 제품 수요를 바탕으로 4분기 실적 전망치를 상향 조정했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 비일반회계기준(non-GAAP) 매출 총이익률 가이던스를 기존 42.0%에서 44.5%로 상향 조정했습니다.

watchItems.text: 8월 11일 개최되는 2025 Keybanc 기술 컨퍼런스에서 경영진이 제공할 추가적인 사업 업데이트 내용을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm2522933d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Micron Updates Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2025 Guidance BOISE, Idaho, Aug. 11, 2025 – Micron Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MU) (the “Company”) today announced that it is updating its revenue, gross margin, operating expense, and EPS guidance for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, which ends August 28, 2025. The Company previously provided guidance for revenue of $10.7 billion ± $300 million, non-GAAP gross margins of 42.0% ± 1.0%, and non-GAAP EPS of $2.50 ± $0.15 for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025. The Company today updated its guidance for fourth quarter of fiscal 2025 revenue to $11.2 billion ± $100 million, non-GAAP gross margins to 44.5% ± 0.5%, and non-GAAP EPS to $2.85 ± $0.07. The Co  Normalized numeric aliases: $10.7 billion = 107억 달러; $300 million = 3억 달러; $11.2 billion = 112억 달러; $100 million = 1억 달러; $10.7 = 10.7달러; $300 = 300달러; $2.50 = 2.50달러; $0.15 = 0.15달러; $100 = 100달러; $11.2 = 11.2달러; $2.85 = 2.85달러; $0.07 = 0.07달러.

RAM, and strong execution. Micron Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer, Sumit Sadana, will share further updates in a fireside chat at the 2025 Keybanc Technology Conference in Park City, Utah scheduled to take place at 9:00 a.m. Mountain time on August 11, 2025. The live webcast and subsequent replay of the event can be accessed from Micron’s Investor Relations website at http://investors.micron.com.
